name: Super Team Buddy Force Unite!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>一</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>族</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>集</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand or GY, with the same original Type as that monster's, but with a different original name. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Set 1 "Super Team Buddy Force Unite!" directly from your Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; Special Summon 1 monster from your hand or GY, with the same original Type as that monster's, but with a different original name. If this card in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Set 1 "Super Team Buddy Force Unite!" directly from your Deck to your Spell & Trap Zone.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
